name: OnSecurityLocalPDUPreTx
title: OnSecurityLocalPDUPreTx
syntax: void OnSecurityLocalPDUPreTx(char pduName[], dword dataId, byte payload[], dword payloadLength, qword& authInfo, dword authInfoBitLength, qword& freshness, dword freshnessBitLength)
description: This callback handler is called, after all data updates and the automatic Authenticator (CMAC) calculation has be done. Payload, AuthInfo and freshness can be modified in this handler before the transmission starts. Fault injection and evaluation of new algorithm are typical examples.
return:
byte payload[]
The payload of the PDU.
